channel.title: Ian Liew
channel.description: Writing on data, ML, and ideas.

item.description: Maturity of mind is the capacity to endure uncertainty

item.description: My journey and summary of what I've learnt.

China's breakdown reveals the problem with the engine

item.title: Top 10 DM / ML Algorithms
item.description: If I were interviewing you for a Data Mining position what would be the top 10 algorithms I would expect you to know in order of priority?

item.title: Competitive Advantages
item.description: Competitive advantage occurs when an organization acquires or develops an attribute or combination of attributes that allows it to outperform its competitors.
